word: G3765 - οὐκέτι - oukéti - ook-et'-ee - After that

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
no longer, no more, no further

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Also (separately) οὐκ ἔτι ouk eti ook et'-ee

From G3756 and G2089; not yet, no longer: - after that (not), (not) any more, henceforth (hereafter), not, no longer (more), not as yet (now), now no more (not), yet (not).
